title: Shell Fuel Card
description: A Shell B2B fuel card used for fleet fuel purchases

cardId.description: Unique identifier for the fuel card

cardPAN.description: Primary Account Number of the fuel card

maskedPAN.description: Masked card number for display purposes

cardStatus.description: Current status of the fuel card

accountNumber.description: Customer account number associated with the card

driverName.description: Name of the driver assigned to the card

vehicleRegistration.description: Vehicle registration number for vehicle-based cards

cardType.description: Type of fuel card (e.g., multi-product, fuel-only)

limits.description: Spending limits and restrictions applied to the card

CardLimit.title: Shell Card Limit
CardLimit.description: A spending limit or restriction on a fuel card

period.description: Period for the limit (daily, weekly, monthly)
